# RadixSort

- key is a fixed d digit
- radix：进制的base
	- 十进制：radix = 10
	- 英文字母：radix = 26
	- 字节：256
-  a sort that works with one character at a time (by grouping objects that have the same digit in the same position).
- Symbols:
	  N = number of keys
	  W = length of longest key (digits / chars)
	  R = radix (alphabet size of each digit)

## LSD 
- right to left
- Time Θ(WN + WR) ≈ Θ(WN)

## MSD
- left to right
  - Worst-case Θ(WN + WR) (same as LSD)
  - Best-case (only need top digit, R > N): Θ(N + R)
